title: [MTR3/4]West Midlands Trains
description: This resource pack adds West Midlands Trains class 139 & 730 for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
## Introduction
This resource pack adds West Midlands Trains class 730 fleet for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway Mod** (MTR3, MTR4 - Latest updated version) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 version (NTE)

## Terms & Disclaimer
This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

**MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions**, and for MTR3, please follow the car formations except freelength. (MTR4's formation isn't affected)

for more information, check readme inside the pack.

## **Contents**

* West Midlands Railway Class 730 
* London Northwestern Railway Class 730
* West Midlands Railway Class 139 (MTR4)
* London Midland Class 139 (MTR4)
